product.name: AmazeFan Pull Up Bar Doorway with Ergonomic Grip - Fitness Chin-Up Frame for Home Gym Exercise - Multi-Angle Grip - 2024 Upgrade Smart Hook (Fits Almost All Doors)
product.description: Pull Up Bar Doorway with Ergonomic Grip - Fitness Chin-Up Frame for Home Gym Exercise - Multi-Angle Grip - 2024 Upgrade Smart Hook (Fits Almost All Doors)
features: 💪【ERGONOMIC PULL UP BAR】 The Ergonomic Multi Angled Grips Pull Up Bar, ideal for exercising and increasing the width of the latissimus dorsi. Inclined ends help protect wrists - Enhanced and widened grip, no pain after frequent training.Soft Foams - Optimum grip and no slipping, especially for sweaty hands.

💪【SIMPLE INSTALLATION AND MULTI-PURPOSE】 Simple Assembly, Hang It On The Door Frame To Start Exercising Immediately, Solid Steel Construction For Maximum Stability. Ideal For Pull-Ups, Push-Ups, Boxing And More To Exercise Your Muscle. Say Goodbye To The Gym With Our Pull Up Bar，Multiple Use Flexible Uses Include Push-Up And Sit Ups/Dynamic Stretching.
💪【MULTI-ANGLE GRIP】 2024 Upgrade Smart Hook, allowing users to train with various grips to target different muscle groups and enhance body flexibility and coordination.

💪【DOORFRAME PROTECTION】 The 2 detachable buffer Premium silicone pads can prevent damage to your door frame.The bar leaves no mark on your frame.easy storage - Our pull up bar is a best time and space saver, and you can store it in few seconds after a convenient training.

💪【MORE DETAILS】 Our pull up bar for doorway can fit all doors, even doors in the corner and he narrower doors.The distance between the two "hook " is cut down to 21.65 inch, It can fit a door width of 21.65”- 36.22” (55 - 92 cm) and depth of 8.27” (21 cm), acceptable trim height up to 3.54"(9 cm). Please measure the space inside the door frame before purchasing.
